subcodes.first_line: O beloved maidservant of God! Your letter has been received. The question you have raised has already been asked by others
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه شما رسید سوالیکه نموده بودید از پیش دیگران هم
subcodes.subjects: @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @laws of marriage and dowry, @law of divorce
